evals.prompt: I want to add dark mode support to our React dashboard. It touches the theme provider, all 12 component files, the settings page, and local storage persistence. Plan this out.
evals.expected_output: Phase specs (foundation/theme provider, component migration, settings UI, persistence) plus a task-graph JSON with 15-20 tasks, explicit prerequisites, and acceptance criteria per task. Should include a debrief loop asking for feedback before implementation.
expectations: Phase specs follow the template (Goal, Dependencies, Outputs consumed by, Tasks with acceptance criteria)
Task graph JSON includes $schema, version, family, summary, assumptions, tasks array, executionOrder
Each task has id, phase, ref, title, description, type, target, prerequisites, status, acceptanceCriteria
Presents plan summary and asks for user feedback before proceeding

evals.prompt: Break down adding WebSocket support to our Express API into a task graph. We need a connection manager, event handlers for 5 event types, auth middleware, and client SDK updates.
evals.expected_output: Phase specs covering infrastructure (connection manager, auth), event handlers, and client SDK. Task graph with proper dependency chain — auth middleware before event handlers, connection manager before everything.
expectations: Phase decomposition separates infrastructure from feature work from client SDK
Auth middleware task is a prerequisite for event handler tasks
Connection manager is a prerequisite for all WebSocket tasks
Task graph has valid executionOrder with parallelSafe flags
Asks the user to review the plan before implementation

evals.prompt: Turn what we just did into a plan — we designed a directive injection system for our agent pipeline. The design is done, I need it as phases and a task graph.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes that design already exists in conversation, extracts phases from the design, produces phase specs and task graph without re-inventing the design. Debrief loop confirms the extraction is accurate.
expectations: Extracts structure from conversation history rather than interviewing from scratch
Phase specs reference specific design decisions already made
Task graph tasks align with the existing design
Asks user to verify the extracted plan matches their intent
